name: Credit Corp Group Limited
analysis: CCP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$12.2600. Trade idea: entry A$13.0300, stop A$11.0583, target A$14.5370 (0.76:1) — then trail it.
